query:
-- Itemwise tab: sum of order_items.lineTotal via INNER JOIN products
SELECT 
  'Itemwise Tab' as source,
  COUNT(DISTINCT oi.orderId) as order_count,
  COUNT(*) as item_rows,
  SUM(oi.quantity) as total_qty,
  SUM(oi.lineTotal) as line_total_paise,
  SUM(oi.lineTotal) / 100.0 as line_total_rupees
FROM order_items oi
INNER JOIN products p ON oi.productId = p.id
INNER JOIN orders o ON oi.orderId = o.id
WHERE o.orderStatus != 'cancelled' 
  AND o.createdAt >= '2026-01-01' 
  AND o.createdAt <= '2026-02-28 23:59:59';
command:
